hero.headline: The Styler That Does It All

features.feature_1_description: Straighten, curl, wave, volumise, and smooth — one tool replaces five.
features.feature_2_description: Negative ions seal the cuticle for glass-smooth results and significantly less heat damage.
features.feature_3_description: Dual voltage, compact size, and worldwide compatibility. Style anywhere you go.
features.feature_4_description: Presented in a signature quilted case — gift-ready straight from the box.

bundle.card_2_includes: Styler + Vanity Case + Heat Mat + Travel Pouch

how_it_works.headline: Three steps to perfect hair
how_it_works.step_1_description: Divide your hair into manageable sections for the smoothest, most even results.
how_it_works.step_2_description: Run the Dahlia Styler smoothly from root to tip in one fluid motion.
how_it_works.step_3_description: Enjoy salon-quality results from the comfort of your own home.

faq.headline: Common questions
faq.q1: Do you ship across Saudi Arabia?
faq.a1: Yes — we offer free standard shipping on all orders above 200 ر.س across the Kingdom, with express options available at checkout.
faq.a2: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. The product must be in its original condition and packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.
faq.q3: Am I eligible for Tamara installments?
faq.a3: Yes. Tamara is available at checkout for eligible orders. Split your total into 4 interest-free instalments — no hidden fees.
faq.q4: Which hair types does the styler work on?
faq.a4: The Dahlia Styler works on all hair types — fine, thick, curly, straight, and colour-treated hair. Adjustable heat settings let you tailor the temperature to your exact hair type.
faq.q5: What is included in the Vanity Case?
faq.a5: The Full Kit includes the Dahlia Pro Styler, a signature quilted vanity case, a heat-resistant mat, and a compact travel pouch.
faq.a6: All Dahlia products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Extended warranty options are available at checkout.

product.tamara: or 4 × {{ amount }} ر.س interest-free with Tamara

payment_note: We accept Mada and STC Pay
